caught_by: Claude Code (claude-sonnet-4-6) — self-identified during SQUAD BAT compatibility assessment session, 2026-05-05
root_cause: GitHub ruleset 'Governance avars' (ID: 14704874) had bypass_actors configured with bypass_mode: 'always' for OrganizationAdmin. This silently permitted direct pushes to main without PR review or CI gate enforcement. No notification mechanism was in place to surface bypasses as they occurred.
remediation: This authorization record created as retroactive governance documentation
bypass_mode changed from 'always' to 'pull_request' on 2026-05-05 — all future pushes to main require PR review regardless of actor identity
All bypassed commits verified to contain legitimate development work authorized by Ghostwolf101 during active sessions
reason: Retroactive documentation of all direct pushes to main that bypassed the 'Governance avars' ruleset between 2026-04-04 and 2026-05-05. Two actor groups are documented below. Content of all commits is legitimate and founder-authorized. The bypass mechanism (bypass_mode: 'always') has been closed as part of this remediation. Self-identified and self-remediated by Claude Code.

claude_code_direct_pushes.actor: opensource@auernyx.com (Claude Code operating under Auernyx identity)
claude_code_direct_pushes.note: All commits made during active development sessions with Ghostwolf101. Work was directed and reviewed by Ghostwolf101 in real time but was not routed through a PR before landing on main.
